Added_Other.mechanism: Prevents the combination of individual makeup assets into a single asset.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows for more flexibility and customization in character appearance.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUnifyCaptures
Added_Other.mechanism: Combines different capture methods into a single system.
Added_Other.purpose: Simplifies the experience for players when capturing game events or achievements.
